rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Only include input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in the annex agree block when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided.
generic_rules: Use boolean helper declarations to express range conditions in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their expressions in AGREE contracts.
Formulate assumptions and guarantees using visible feature names and legal thresholds from the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare range checks as boolean expressions: eq var : bool = value >= min and value <= max;
Place AGREE annex blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes based on the scope of the referenced features.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or using subcomponent ports directly in type contracts.
Do not include range assumptions or guarantees without concrete bounds or visible relations.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
